item.title: Clean up unused and redundant variable declarations
item.intent: Remove or properly scope variables that are declared globally but used locally (LAST_AGENT_LOG, GROOM_ITEMS_ADDED/SKIPPED init), fix the file_count/line_count naming bug, and clean up mid-file global declarations
steps: Move LAST_AGENT_LOG to local scope in the functions that use it
Remove redundant global initialization of GROOM_ITEMS_ADDED/SKIPPED (already reset inside function)
Fix variable named file_count that should be line_count in truncate_sprints_jsonl
Consolidate all remaining global variable declarations to the top of the script
acceptanceCriteria: No global variables are declared mid-file (all at top or inside functions as local)
The file_count/line_count naming mismatch is fixed
